headline: Lululemon's next CEO knows how to get it 'back on track': Analyst
summary: Lululemon Athletica (LULU) stock is dropping in Thursday's extended hours after the athleisure brand reported a slight revenue beat and trimmed its full-year revenue forecast. Morningstar senior equity analyst David Swartz explains how incoming CEO Heidi O'Neill will know how to get the company and customer shopping experiences "back on track." O'Neill will start in her chief executive role this September after her non-compete agreement with Nike (NKE) expires.

headline: PVH Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, FY26 Sales Outlook Cut, Stock Down
summary: PVH Corp. beats Q1 estimates as DTC revenues rise 6% Y/Y; Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger momentum holds even as FY26 revenue view eases.

headline: Tommy Hilfiger Owner PVH’s Stock Plummets. Blame the Iran War.
summary: The Calvin Klein parent cuts its full-year revenue guidance, citing the conflict in the Middle East.

headline: Buy Tapestry Stock to Profit From Gen Z’s Retro Tastes
summary: Tapestry’s Coach brand is popular with young consumers. A post-earnings selloff provides investors an entry point to get long the stock.
